metadata.siteDescription: Art Ceramic — custom tile designs, patterns, and sizes for residential and commercial projects.
metadata.homeDescription: Art Ceramic — explore our tile design catalog, available sizes, and project inspiration.
metadata.designsDescription: Browse tile designs, patterns, and available sizes from Art Ceramic.
metadata.blogDescription: News, techniques, and updates from Art Ceramic.

company.name: Art Ceramic
company.tagline: Custom tile designs for every space
company.about: Art Ceramic is a tile design studio specializing in patterns, glazes, and formats for kitchens, bathrooms, and architectural surfaces. Each design is available in multiple sizes — browse the catalog to find the right look for your project.

home.servicesSubtitle: What we offer at the studio and for your projects.
home.designsSubtitle: Explore patterns and available tile sizes.

services.tilesDesc: Original patterns and glazes for kitchens, bathrooms, and feature walls.
services.potteryDesc: Tableware, vases, and decorative pieces thrown and finished by hand.
services.glazingDesc: Professional glazing, firing, and surface treatments for your project.
services.restorationDesc: Careful repair of chipped, cracked, or worn ceramic and tile work.
services.consultationDesc: Pattern selection, color palettes, and layout guidance for your space.
services.workshopsDesc: Introductory and advanced classes in wheel throwing and hand-building.

designs.title: Design
designs.subtitle: Browse our tile patterns. Each design is available in multiple sizes — open any design to view photos and dimensions.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Stories and updates from the studio.
